body:
Next step on the issue https://github.com/CliMA/CloudMicrophysics.jl/issues/608:
  - Introducing `q_lcl` and `q_icl` for cloud liquid water and cloud ice. This is done to differentiate from `q_liq` and `q_ice` that represent the total condensed liquid water and total ice.
  - Adding a small docs page that explains the basics of coupling with thermodynamics of a host model.

labels.description: We should be doing something else
labels.name: Bikeshedding :bike: :house:

title: The Great Rename
